POL-345.title: IMPLEMENT: Add Polaris function-level repository graph backend
POL-345.body:
## Objective

Implement a Polaris-native, function-level repository graph backend covering data model, parser, resolver, query API, and CLI surface.

## Context

Analysis from POL-344 (Analyze and restructure CodeGraph implementation cluster). The governance baseline was established in POL-340. Prior orphaned issues POL-337 and POL-338 have been superseded by this cluster.

## Goal

Deliver a working function-level repository graph that can be built on demand and queried for symbol lookups, call relationships, and impact analysis. Outputs live under graph.outputPath (.polaris/graph/). Graph data is advisory in phase 1.

## Scope

- src/graph/store/**
- src/graph/parser/**
- src/graph/resolver/**
- src/graph/query/**
- src/cli/graph.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Graph store module implemented and tested
- [ ] Tree-sitter extraction pipeline runs deterministically
- [ ] Resolver builds import and call-graph relationships
- [ ] Query API exposes symbol lookup, callers/callees, impacted files, and graph statistics
- [ ] CLI surface provides graph build, query, and impact commands
- [ ] npm run build and npm test pass

## Validation

- npm run build
- npm test
- npx vitest run src/graph/

## Ordering

Depends on POL-340 (graph artifact governance) — Done.

## Non-goals

- No worker packet / librarian integration in this cluster
- No watcher or incremental rebuild in phase 1
- No wholesale CodeGraph adoption

POL-346.title: Graph store — data model and SQLite baseline
POL-346.body:
## Objective

Implement the graph store module: type system, SQLite schema, versioning, DB adapter boundary, and baseline query primitives.

## Scope

- src/graph/store/types.ts
- src/graph/store/schema.sql
- src/graph/store/adapter.ts
- src/graph/store/queries.ts
- src/graph/store/adapter.test.ts

## Validation

- npm run build
- npm test
- npx vitest run src/graph/

## Ordering

No dependencies — executes first in cluster.

POL-347.title: Graph parser — tree-sitter extraction pipeline
POL-347.body:
## Objective

Implement the tree-sitter extraction pipeline: load grammars, run deterministic AST symbol extraction over TypeScript/JavaScript source files, and persist extracted nodes/edges into the graph store.

## Scope

- src/graph/parser/loader.ts
- src/graph/parser/extract.ts
- src/graph/parser/pipeline.ts
- src/graph/parser/extract.test.ts

## Validation

- npm run build
- npm test
- npx vitest run src/graph/

## Ordering

Depends on POL-346 (graph store) being Done.

POL-348.title: Graph resolver — import resolution and relationship builder
POL-348.body:
## Objective

Implement the graph resolver: resolve import paths, create caller/callee and file-ownership edges in the graph store.

## Scope

- src/graph/resolver/index.ts
- src/graph/resolver/resolve-imports.ts
- src/graph/resolver/build-edges.ts
- src/graph/resolver/index.test.ts

## Validation

- npm run build
- npm test
- npx vitest run src/graph/

## Ordering

Depends on POL-346 (graph store) and POL-347 (parser) being Done.

POL-349.title: Graph query API — symbol lookup and impact queries
POL-349.body:
## Objective

Implement the graph query API: stable query functions for symbol lookup, callers/callees, impacted files, and graph statistics.

## Scope

- src/graph/query/index.ts
- src/graph/query/types.ts
- src/graph/query/index.test.ts

## Validation

- npm run build
- npm test
- npx vitest run src/graph/

## Ordering

Depends on POL-346 (graph store) and POL-348 (resolver) being Done.

POL-350.title: Graph CLI surface — build / query / impact commands
POL-350.body:
## Objective

Add CLI commands for building, querying, and computing impact from the repository graph.

## Scope

- src/cli/graph.ts
- src/cli/index.ts (register graph subcommand)

## Validation

- npm run build
- npm test
- npm run polaris -- graph build --dry-run

## Ordering

Depends on POL-349 (query API) being Done.

POL-345.title: IMPLEMENT: Add Polaris function-level repository graph backend
